fig-0-leaves-vs-flower:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 380" role="img" aria-label="Two plants side by side: on the left a tall bushy green leafy plant labelled LEAVES, grow the body, vegetative; on the right a stockier plant covered in fat pink buds labelled FLOWER, make the buds you harvest, generative. A slider track with a centre handle between them labelled which way you steer." font-family="sans-serif">
  <title>The Two Things We Steer Between</title>
  <desc>Leaves means a bigger green plant; flower means the buds you harvest. Steering slides between them.</desc>

  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#b4c2af"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Figure title -->
  <text x="450" y="40" text-anchor="middle" fill="#eaf1e8" font-size="20" font-weight="bold">The Two Things We Steer Between</text>

  <!-- ===================== LEFT PANEL: LEAVES ===================== -->
  <rect x="40" y="62" width="350" height="248" rx="14" fill="#141c14"/>

  <!-- pot -->
  <path d="M150 286 L280 286 L270 318 L160 318 Z" fill="#d9b88a"/>
  <!-- main stem -->
  <rect x="212" y="150" width="6" height="138" rx="3" fill="#46c46a"/>
  <!-- big bushy leaves (fan-shaped clusters) -->
  <g fill="#46c46a">
    <path d="M215 250 C175 250 150 232 138 210 C168 214 196 224 215 244 Z"/>
    <path d="M215 250 C255 250 280 232 292 210 C262 214 234 224 215 244 Z"/>
    <path d="M215 218 C170 216 140 196 126 170 C160 174 192 188 215 210 Z"/>
    <path d="M215 218 C260 216 290 196 304 170 C270 174 238 188 215 210 Z"/>
    <path d="M215 186 C178 182 152 162 142 138 C172 144 198 160 215 182 Z"/>
    <path d="M215 186 C252 182 278 162 288 138 C258 144 232 160 215 182 Z"/>
  </g>
  <!-- top crown leaves (lighter) -->
  <g fill="#84e6a2">
    <path d="M215 158 C200 130 200 108 208 92 C214 110 216 132 215 152 Z"/>
    <path d="M215 158 C232 130 254 116 270 110 C254 130 234 146 217 156 Z"/>
    <path d="M215 158 C198 130 176 116 160 110 C176 130 196 146 213 156 Z"/>
  </g>

  <!-- LEAVES labels -->
  <text x="215" y="346" text-anchor="middle" fill="#46c46a" font-size="30" font-weight="bold">LEAVES</text>
  <text x="215" y="368" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="15">grow the body
    <tspan fill="#83917e" font-size="13"> (vegetative)</tspan>
  </text>
  <text x="215" y="84" text-anchor="middle" fill="#83917e" font-size="13" font-style="italic">a bigger green plant</text>

  <!-- ===================== RIGHT PANEL: FLOWER ===================== -->
  <rect x="510" y="62" width="350" height="248" rx="14" fill="#141c14"/>

  <!-- pot -->
  <path d="M620 286 L750 286 L740 318 L630 318 Z" fill="#d9b88a"/>
  <!-- short stocky stem -->
  <rect x="682" y="190" width="6" height="98" rx="3" fill="#46c46a"/>
  <!-- a few small support leaves (green) -->
  <g fill="#46c46a">
    <path d="M685 250 C655 250 636 238 628 222 C652 226 672 234 685 246 Z"/>
    <path d="M685 250 C715 250 734 238 742 222 C718 226 698 234 685 246 Z"/>
  </g>
  <!-- fat sticky BUDS (pink clusters) -->
  <g fill="#f472b6">
    <ellipse cx="685" cy="150" rx="30" ry="46"/>
    <ellipse cx="648" cy="196" rx="22" ry="32"/>
    <ellipse cx="722" cy="196" rx="22" ry="32"/>
    <ellipse cx="663" cy="232" rx="17" ry="24"/>
    <ellipse cx="707" cy="232" rx="17" ry="24"/>
  </g>
  <!-- bud highlights (lighter pink) -->
  <g fill="#ffb0da">
    <ellipse cx="679" cy="138" rx="13" ry="22"/>
    <ellipse cx="643" cy="188" rx="9" ry="14"/>
    <ellipse cx="717" cy="188" rx="9" ry="14"/>
  </g>
  <!-- resin sparkle dots -->
  <g fill="#ffb0da" opacity="0.9">
    <circle cx="700" cy="160" r="2.2"/>
    <circle cx="672" cy="172" r="2.2"/>
    <circle cx="690" cy="186" r="2.2"/>
    <circle cx="656" cy="206" r="2"/>
    <circle cx="716" cy="208" r="2"/>
  </g>

  <!-- FLOWER labels -->
  <text x="685" y="346" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f472b6" font-size="30" font-weight="bold">FLOWER</text>
  <text x="685" y="368" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="15">make the buds — what you harvest
    <tspan fill="#83917e" font-size="13"> (generative)</tspan>
  </text>
  <text x="685" y="84" text-anchor="middle" fill="#83917e" font-size="13" font-style="italic">the resin you smoke or sell</text>

  <!-- ===================== CENTRE SLIDER ===================== -->
  <!-- slider track -->
  <rect x="402" y="186" width="96" height="10" rx="5" fill="#26331e"/>
  <!-- tiny direction arrows on the track -->
  <line x1="430" y1="191" x2="406" y2="191" stroke="#b4c2af" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <line x1="470" y1="191" x2="494" y2="191" stroke="#b4c2af" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <!-- handle in the middle -->
  <circle cx="450" cy="191" r="15" fill="#eaf1e8" stroke="#9b7be8" stroke-width="3"/>
  <!-- label -->
  <text x="450" y="232" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="14" font-weight="bold">which way</text>
  <text x="450" y="250" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="14" font-weight="bold">you steer</text>
</svg>
fig-1-car-controls:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 420" role="img" aria-label="Car dashboard metaphor: a steering wheel is how full the sponge is (VWC), a foot pedal is the drink-down, a gear stick is feed strength (EC), and the gearbox underneath is the sponge. Same three controls for every sponge — you only swap the gearbox." font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="ah" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="#83917e"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="450" y="40" text-anchor="middle" font-size="24" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">Same Controls, Different Car</text>
  <text x="450" y="66" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" fill="#b4c2af">You drive every sponge with the exact same three controls.</text>

  <!-- Dashboard panel -->
  <rect x="40" y="86" width="820" height="252" rx="14" fill="#141c14" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- ===== STEERING WHEEL (water / VWC) ===== -->
  <g>
    <circle cx="190" cy="190" r="62" fill="none" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="10"/>
    <circle cx="190" cy="190" r="20" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <!-- spokes -->
    <line x1="190" y1="190" x2="190" y2="128" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="8"/>
    <line x1="190" y1="190" x2="137" y2="221" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="8"/>
    <line x1="190" y1="190" x2="243" y2="221" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="8"/>
    <circle cx="190" cy="190" r="62" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- driver hands -->
    <rect x="120" y="178" width="16" height="24" rx="8" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <rect x="244" y="178" width="16" height="24" rx="8" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <text x="190" y="288" text-anchor="middle" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#8fd0ff">how full the sponge is</text>
    <text x="190" y="308" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#83917e">VWC</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== FOOT PEDAL (drink-down / dryback) ===== -->
  <g>
    <!-- pivot bar -->
    <line x1="430" y1="138" x2="468" y2="158" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- pedal pad -->
    <rect x="408" y="158" width="60" height="78" rx="12" fill="#f5a83f" stroke="#ffce86" stroke-width="3" transform="rotate(18 438 197)"/>
    <line x1="424" y1="178" x2="452" y2="188" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="3" transform="rotate(18 438 197)" opacity="0.45"/>
    <line x1="420" y1="196" x2="448" y2="206" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="3" transform="rotate(18 438 197)" opacity="0.45"/>
    <line x1="416" y1="214" x2="444" y2="224" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="3" transform="rotate(18 438 197)" opacity="0.45"/>
    <!-- press arrow -->
    <line x1="438" y1="118" x2="438" y2="146" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ah)"/>
    <text x="438" y="288" text-anchor="middle" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86">the drink-down</text>
    <text x="438" y="308" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#83917e">how dry it gets</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== GEAR STICK (feed strength / EC) ===== -->
  <g>
    <!-- boot -->
    <path d="M636 236 L676 236 L668 206 L644 206 Z" fill="#1c271b" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- shaft -->
    <line x1="656" y1="212" x2="668" y2="150" stroke="#f472b6" stroke-width="9" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- knob -->
    <circle cx="669" cy="146" r="17" fill="#f472b6" stroke="#ffb0da" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- gate dots -->
    <circle cx="636" cy="232" r="3" fill="#83917e"/>
    <circle cx="676" cy="232" r="3" fill="#83917e"/>
    <text x="656" y="288" text-anchor="middle" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffb0da">feed strength</text>
    <text x="656" y="308" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#83917e">EC</text>
  </g>

  <!-- divider before gearbox -->
  <line x1="742" y1="120" x2="742" y2="304" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="4 6"/>

  <!-- ===== GEARBOX (the sponge) ===== -->
  <g>
    <rect x="766" y="150" width="72" height="92" rx="12" fill="#d9b88a" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- cog teeth hint -->
    <circle cx="790" cy="178" r="11" fill="none" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.4"/>
    <circle cx="814" cy="212" r="14" fill="none" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="3" opacity="0.4"/>
    <circle cx="790" cy="178" r="3" fill="#0e150d" opacity="0.4"/>
    <circle cx="814" cy="212" r="3" fill="#0e150d" opacity="0.4"/>
    <text x="802" y="288" text-anchor="middle" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#f0d9b5">the sponge</text>
    <text x="802" y="308" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#83917e">swap me</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Bottom caption strip -->
  <rect x="40" y="356" width="820" height="44" rx="12" fill="#1c271b" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="450" y="383" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">same controls — you only swap the gearbox underneath</text>
</svg>

fig-3-sponge-seesaw:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 380" role="img" aria-label="The Sponge See-Saw: adding water to a sponge always pushes out the air that roots breathe. Two sponge states side by side: a drier sponge with a small blue water zone and a big air zone where a root breathes, and a wetter sponge with a big blue water zone and a thin squeezed air zone where the root gasps. Above, a balance beam tips down on the water side, showing more water means less air." font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#b4c2af"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="450" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">The Sponge See-Saw: Water vs Air</text>

  <!-- ===== SEE-SAW / balance beam ===== -->
  <!-- pivot triangle -->
  <path d="M450 118 L432 150 L468 150 Z" fill="#83917e"/>
  <!-- tipped beam: water end (left) DOWN, air end (right) UP -->
  <g>
    <line x1="316" y1="128" x2="584" y2="92" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- water drop on the heavy (down) end -->
    <path d="M316 128 c-13 -16 -22 -25 -22 -36 a22 22 0 0 1 44 0 c0 11 -9 20 -22 36 Z" transform="translate(0,14)" fill="#46a8ec" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="316" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#8fd0ff">more water</text>
    <!-- air bubble on the light (up) end -->
    <circle cx="584" cy="70" r="20" fill="none" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="577" cy="63" r="5" fill="#84e6a2" opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="584" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#84e6a2">less air</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== DRIER sponge (left) ===== -->
  <g>
    <text x="218" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">DRIER</text>
    <rect x="68" y="222" width="300" height="120" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#d9b88a" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="218" y="362" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#83917e">total room (fixed)</text>

    <!-- small water fill (left) -->
    <rect x="71" y="225" width="96" height="114" rx="10" fill="#46a8ec" opacity="0.85"/>
    <text x="119" y="288" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#0e150d">water</text>
    <!-- divider -->
    <line x1="167" y1="222" x2="167" y2="342" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- big air zone (right) -->
    <text x="276" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">air</text>
    <circle cx="205" cy="262" r="6" fill="none" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="248" cy="250" r="5" fill="none" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="300" cy="268" r="7" fill="none" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="338" cy="252" r="5" fill="none" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="2"/>
    <circle cx="285" cy="300" r="5" fill="none" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="2"/>

    <!-- breathing root: happy -->
    <path d="M232 312 q14 14 30 6 q14 -8 28 4" fill="none" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="232" cy="312" r="5" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <text x="280" y="334" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#84e6a2">root breathes</text>
  </g>

  <!-- arrow: add water -->
  <line x1="380" y1="282" x2="520" y2="282" stroke="#b4c2af" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <text x="450" y="274" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#46a8ec">add water</text>

  <!-- ===== WETTER sponge (right) ===== -->
  <g>
    <text x="682" y="210" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">WETTER</text>
    <rect x="532" y="222" width="300" height="120" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#d9b88a" stroke-width="3"/>
    <text x="682" y="362" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#83917e">total room (fixed)</text>

    <!-- big water fill (left), divider pushed right -->
    <rect x="535" y="225" width="220" height="114" rx="10" fill="#46a8ec" opacity="0.85"/>
    <text x="645" y="288" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#0e150d">water</text>
    <line x1="755" y1="222" x2="755" y2="342" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="3"/>

    <!-- thin squeezed air zone (right) -->
    <text x="793" y="245" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86">air</text>
    <circle cx="793" cy="278" r="4" fill="none" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="2"/>

    <!-- gasping root -->
    <path d="M700 312 q14 -6 30 2 q14 8 28 -2" fill="none" stroke="#ef6a5a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="700" cy="312" r="5" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
    <text x="745" y="334" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#ef6a5a">root gasps</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Caption -->
  <text x="450" y="378" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#b4c2af">add water → lose air; the roots breathe the air</text>
</svg>
fig-4-air-when-wet:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 380" role="img" aria-label="Four fully-soaked blocks compared by how much air they keep: coco about 22 percent air, peat 18 to 25 percent, rockwool about 10 percent, and a water tank with roots plus an air pump. Coco keeps the most air so it is hardest to drown." font-family="sans-serif">
  <title>Who Keeps Air When Soaked</title>
  <desc>Coco stays airy even soaked, which is why it forgives heavy watering.</desc>

  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- title -->
  <text x="36" y="40" font-size="22" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">Who Keeps Air When Soaked</text>
  <text x="36" y="64" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">All four are FULLY watered — the open bubbles on top show the air that stays for the roots.</text>

  <!-- ===================== BLOCK 1: COCO ===================== -->
  <g>
    <rect x="36" y="92" width="180" height="210" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#26331e"/>
    <!-- water body -->
    <rect x="52" y="170" width="148" height="116" rx="9" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <!-- air gap (biggest) -->
    <rect x="52" y="108" width="148" height="62" rx="9" fill="#141c14" stroke="#26331e" stroke-dasharray="4 4"/>
    <!-- bubbles -->
    <circle cx="74" cy="134" r="11" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <circle cx="104" cy="150" r="9" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <circle cx="132" cy="130" r="13" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <circle cx="160" cy="151" r="8" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <circle cx="182" cy="132" r="7" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <!-- breathing root (big) -->
    <path d="M126 196 C126 184 126 176 126 170 M126 178 C118 174 113 170 110 164 M126 184 C134 180 140 176 144 170" fill="none" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="126" cy="164" r="3" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <!-- labels -->

fig-5-cushion-spectrum:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 400" role="img" aria-label="The Mistake-Cushion Spectrum: living soil is a thick pillow that keeps a feeding-mistake egg intact, coco is a medium cushion, rockwool is a thin pad that cracks the egg, and water is a bare floor that smashes it. More control means less protection from yourself." font-family="sans-serif">
  <title>The Mistake-Cushion Spectrum</title>
  <desc>The same feeding-mistake egg dropped onto four growing mediums of shrinking cushion thickness: soil and coco keep the egg whole, rockwool cracks it, water smashes it.</desc>

  <defs>
    <marker id="ah" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="#83917e"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- top tag -->
  <g>
    <rect x="330" y="14" width="240" height="28" rx="14" fill="#141c14" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <text x="450" y="33" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af" font-style="italic">the OTHER thing a sponge does</text>
  </g>

  <!-- title -->
  <text x="450" y="68" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">The Mistake-Cushion Spectrum</text>

  <!-- the same falling egg, drawn small as a hint near the title -->
  <g transform="translate(450,82)" opacity="0.9">
    <text x="0" y="10" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#83917e">same "feeding mistake" drops on each ↓</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ======== columns ======== -->
  <!-- col geometry: 4 columns centered at x = 130, 320, 510, 700-ish; floor baseline y=300 -->

  <!-- floor baseline reference -->
  <line x1="40" y1="300" x2="860" y2="300" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="1.5"/>

  <!-- ===== 1. LIVING SOIL = thick pillow ===== -->
  <g>
    <!-- egg, intact/happy -->
    <g transform="translate(125,135)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="17" ry="22" fill="#84e6a2" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="2.5"/>
      <circle cx="-6" cy="-3" r="2.4" fill="#1a2a18"/>
      <circle cx="6" cy="-3" r="2.4" fill="#1a2a18"/>
      <path d="M-7,7 Q0,13 7,7" fill="none" stroke="#1a2a18" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>
    <!-- thick pillow -->
    <rect x="62" y="222" width="126" height="78" rx="22" fill="#d9b88a" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <path d="M82,238 Q125,228 168,238" fill="none" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="2" opacity="0.7"/>
    <text x="125" y="270" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#3a2c18">thick pillow</text>
    <!-- name -->
    <text x="125" y="330" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">LIVING SOIL</text>
    <text x="125" y="352" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#84e6a2">very forgiving</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== 2. COCO = medium cushion ===== -->
  <g>
    <g transform="translate(320,140)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="17" ry="22" fill="#84e6a2" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="2.5"/>
      <circle cx="-6" cy="-3" r="2.4" fill="#1a2a18"/>
      <circle cx="6" cy="-3" r="2.4" fill="#1a2a18"/>
      <path d="M-7,6 Q0,11 7,6" fill="none" stroke="#1a2a18" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>
    <!-- medium cushion -->
    <rect x="262" y="250" width="116" height="50" rx="16" fill="#d9b88a" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <text x="320" y="280" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#3a2c18">medium</text>
    <text x="320" y="330" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">COCO</text>
    <text x="320" y="352" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#84e6a2">still forgiving</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== 3. ROCKWOOL = thin pad, egg CRACKED ===== -->
  <g>
    <!-- egg cracked -->
    <g transform="translate(515,150)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="0" rx="17" ry="22" fill="#ffce86" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="2.5"/>
      <!-- crack -->
      <path d="M-3,-22 L2,-6 L-4,2 L3,10 L0,22" fill="none" stroke="#ef6a5a" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
      <circle cx="-7" cy="-2" r="2.2" fill="#5a3a10"/>
      <circle cx="6" cy="-2" r="2.2" fill="#5a3a10"/>
      <path d="M-6,8 Q0,5 6,9" fill="none" stroke="#5a3a10" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>
    <!-- thin pad -->
    <rect x="462" y="278" width="106" height="22" rx="9" fill="#d9b88a" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <text x="515" y="294" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#3a2c18">thin pad</text>
    <text x="515" y="330" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">ROCKWOOL</text>
    <text x="515" y="352" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#ffce86">mistake hurts fast</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===== 4. WATER = bare floor, egg SMASHED ===== -->
  <g>
    <!-- splatter / smashed egg -->
    <g transform="translate(710,290)">
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="6" rx="46" ry="11" fill="#ffb3a8" opacity="0.5"/>
      <ellipse cx="0" cy="4" rx="30" ry="8" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
      <!-- yolk -->
      <circle cx="0" cy="2" r="9" fill="#ffce86" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="2"/>
      <!-- splatter bits -->
      <circle cx="-40" cy="0" r="3" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
      <circle cx="38" cy="2" r="3.5" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
      <circle cx="-26" cy="-6" r="2.5" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
      <circle cx="24" cy="-7" r="2.5" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
      <!-- shell shards -->
      <path d="M-18,-3 l6,-7 l5,7 z" fill="#fff" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
      <path d="M16,-2 l6,-6 l4,6 z" fill="#fff" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    </g>
    <!-- bare floor line (the "medium" is just the floor) -->
    <line x1="655" y1="300" x2="765" y2="300" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <text x="710" y="320" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" font-weight="bold" fill="#8fd0ff">bare floor — no cushion</text>
    <text x="710" y="338" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">WATER</text>
    <text x="710" y="358" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#ef6a5a">one mistake breaks the egg</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ======== the spectrum axis (drawn last, on top, low) ======== -->
  <g transform="translate(0,392)">
    <line x1="70" y1="0" x2="830" y2="0" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ah)"/>
    <text x="78" y="-6" text-anchor="start" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">thick cushion (forgiving)</text>
    <text x="822" y="-6" text-anchor="end" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">bare floor (harsh)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- caption -->
  <text x="450" y="376" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#b4c2af">more control = less protection from yourself</text>
</svg>
fig-6-dryback-wring:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 400" role="img" aria-label="The drink-down is a wring: a sponge being squeezed loses water just like the water level dropping from 78 percent to 58 percent, a 20-point drink-down, with a red danger line never to cross." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arr" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#f5a83f"/>

  <text x="450" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">The Drink-Down Is a Wring</text>

  <!-- ================= LEFT: sponge being wrung ================= -->
  <rect x="24" y="58" width="408" height="318" rx="14" fill="#141c14"/>
  <text x="228" y="86" text-anchor="middle" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#b4c2af">plant drinks it down</text>

  <!-- ================= RIGHT: line graph ================= -->
  <rect x="456" y="58" width="420" height="318" rx="14" fill="#141c14"/>

  <!-- axis -->
  <line x1="520" y1="100" x2="520" y2="320" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="520" y1="320" x2="852" y2="320" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- high (full mark) guide line -->

fig-7b-thirst-button:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 360" role="img" aria-label="Why thirst makes flowers: a slightly thirsty plant sends a thirst alarm from its roots, which flips an internal switch from making leaves to making flowers. A gentle nudge, not damage." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif">
  <title>Why Thirst Makes Flowers</title>
  <desc>Three panels: a slightly thirsty plant thinks it is a little thirsty; an amber thirst alarm rises from the roots signalling summer is ending; an internal switch flips from a green leaf to a pink flower so the plant hurries to make flowers. A banner reads: a gentle nudge, not damage.</desc>

  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-end">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#83917e"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="450" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">Why Thirst Makes Flowers</text>

  <!-- ===================== PANEL 1 ===================== -->
  <rect x="24" y="58" width="246" height="216" rx="14" fill="#141c14"/>
  <text x="147" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#83917e">1 — a little dry</text>

  <!-- thought bubble -->
  <rect x="48" y="98" width="146" height="36" rx="14" fill="#0e150d" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="121" y="121" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">a little thirsty</text>
  <circle cx="118" cy="142" r="5" fill="#0e150d" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
  <circle cx="128" cy="152" r="3" fill="#0e150d" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- pot -->
  <path d="M120 248 L176 248 L170 200 L126 200 Z" fill="#d9b88a"/>
  <rect x="120" y="190" width="56" height="12" rx="4" fill="#f0d9b5"/>
  <!-- stem -->
  <path d="M148 200 L148 162" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="3" fill="none"/>
  <!-- one drooping-but-fine leaf -->
  <path d="M148 168 C176 162 196 174 200 192 C176 192 156 184 148 168 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
  <path d="M148 168 C166 172 184 182 200 192" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
  <!-- a second, upright healthy leaf so it reads alive -->
  <path d="M148 158 C124 152 108 160 104 174 C126 176 142 170 148 158 Z" fill="#84e6a2"/>

  <!-- ===================== PANEL 2 ===================== -->
  <rect x="327" y="58" width="246" height="216" rx="14" fill="#141c14"/>
  <text x="450" y="84" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#83917e">2 — roots ring the alarm</text>

  <!-- alarm label -->
  <text x="450" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86">thirst alarm —</text>
  <text x="450" y="126" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">summer must be ending!</text>

  <!-- soil line -->
  <rect x="357" y="204" width="186" height="46" rx="8" fill="#0e150d"/>
  <!-- roots -->
  <path d="M450 250 L450 214 M450 224 C432 230 422 240 420 250 M450 224 C468 230 478 240 480 250 M450 234 C440 240 436 246 434 250 M450 234 C460 240 464 246 466 250" stroke="#d9b88a" stroke-width="2.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>

  <!-- rising amber alarm dots -->
  <circle cx="450" cy="196" r="7" fill="#f5a83f"/>
  <circle cx="424" cy="178" r="5.5" fill="#f5a83f" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="476" cy="180" r="5.5" fill="#f5a83f" opacity="0.9"/>
  <circle cx="438" cy="160" r="4.5" fill="#f5a83f" opacity="0.75"/>
  <circle cx="462" cy="158" r="4.5" fill="#f5a83f" opacity="0.75"/>

fig-8-dryback-not-drought:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 380" role="img" aria-label="A how-full-versus-time chart. A green drink-down line falls then is caught by a refill arrow above a red wilt band, marked with a check and 'water before it wilts'. A grey drought line falls straight through the red band into a crash zone ending in a skull, marked 'too far equals crash'." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrowUp" markerWidth="12" markerHeight="12" refX="6" refY="2" orient="auto">
      <path d="M6 0 L11 9 L1 9 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="arrowGrey" markerWidth="11" markerHeight="11" refX="5.5" refY="8" orient="auto">
      <path d="M5.5 10 L10 1 L1 1 Z" fill="#83917e"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="40" y="40" font-size="22" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">Drink-Down Is Not a Drought</text>

  <!-- Chart panel -->
  <rect x="40" y="62" width="820" height="232" rx="12" fill="#141c14"/>

  <!-- Y axis label -->
  <text x="62" y="92" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">how full</text>
  <text x="62" y="110" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">the pot is</text>
  <!-- top/bottom hints -->
  <text x="62" y="146" font-size="12" fill="#83917e">FULL</text>
  <text x="62" y="252" font-size="12" fill="#83917e">EMPTY</text>

  <!-- Chart inner left guide -->
  <line x1="118" y1="80" x2="118" y2="276" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="118" y1="276" x2="838" y2="276" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="118" y="292" font-size="13" fill="#83917e">time</text>
  <text x="800" y="292" font-size="13" fill="#83917e">→</text>

  <!-- RED wilt / stall band along the bottom -->
  <rect x="118" y="224" width="720" height="52" rx="0" fill="#ef6a5a" opacity="0.22"/>
  <line x1="118" y1="224" x2="838" y2="224" stroke="#ef6a5a" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="7 5"/>
  <text x="128" y="244" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">WILT / STALL ZONE</text>

  <!-- GREEN drink-down line: falls toward band, caught above red, refills up -->
  <polyline points="130,118 200,142 270,170 330,205" fill="none" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <!-- refill up-arrow, caught ABOVE the red band -->
  <line x1="330" y1="205" x2="330" y2="120" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="3.5" marker-end="url(#arrowUp)"/>
  <!-- continue the healthy sawtooth a touch -->
  <polyline points="330,120 400,150 470,182 505,206" fill="none" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" opacity="0.55"/>

  <!-- catch dot -->
  <circle cx="330" cy="205" r="6" fill="#84e6a2" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- green check badge + label -->
  <circle cx="372" cy="172" r="15" fill="#46c46a"/>
  <path d="M364 172 l6 6 l11 -13" fill="none" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
  <text x="396" y="170" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">water before</text>
  <text x="396" y="187" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">it wilts</text>

  <!-- GREY drought line: keeps falling THROUGH the red band into crash zone -->
  <polyline points="560,118 630,150 690,188 745,228 785,258" fill="none" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" marker-end="url(#arrowGrey)"/>
  <!-- mark where it crosses into red -->
  <circle cx="745" cy="228" r="5" fill="#83917e"/>

  <!-- red cross / skull at the crash end -->
  <g transform="translate(800,262)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="17" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
    <!-- simple skull -->
    <circle cx="-5" cy="-2" r="3" fill="#0e150d"/>
    <circle cx="5" cy="-2" r="3" fill="#0e150d"/>
    <path d="M-3 6 L0 9 L3 6" fill="none" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  </g>
  <!-- crash label -->
  <text x="612" y="208" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">too far = crash</text>

  <!-- legend dots inside chart -->
  <circle cx="540" cy="92" r="6" fill="#46c46a"/>
  <text x="552" y="97" font-size="12.5" fill="#b4c2af">caught in time</text>
  <circle cx="680" cy="92" r="6" fill="#83917e"/>
  <text x="692" y="97" font-size="12.5" fill="#b4c2af">never caught</text>

  <!-- Caption -->
  <text x="40" y="332" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">water <tspan fill="#46a8ec">BEFORE</tspan> the plant wilts — <tspan fill="#f5a83f">scalpel, not hammer</tspan></text>
</svg>
fig-9-squash-concentration:

    <rect x="560" y="114" width="20" height="12" rx="3" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    <text x="588" y="124" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">amber = feed strength</text>

fig-11-lift-shaft-limits:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 420" role="img" aria-label="A vertical lift-shaft scale of how-full percent. A solid FULL mark sits near 92 percent where water overflows above. A red dashed DANGER line sits around 25 to 30 percent where water tunnels through below. A green safe drink-down range runs between them, and an orange drink-down arc swings down toward but never touching the red line." font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrGreen" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="5" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1,1 L9,5 L1,9 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>

    <marker id="arrOrange" markerWidth="11" markerHeight="11" refX="6" refY="5.5" orient="auto">

  <text x="40" y="44" font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">The 'Full' Mark and the Danger Line</text>

  <rect x="150" y="90" width="100" height="290" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>

  <rect x="153" y="116" width="94" height="261" rx="9" fill="#46a8ec" opacity="0.85"/>
  <rect x="153" y="116" width="94" height="14" rx="7" fill="#8fd0ff" opacity="0.9"/>

  <!-- scale ticks 0,25,50,75,100 ; y = 380 - 2.9*pct -->
  <g fill="#83917e" font-size="12">
    <line x1="142" y1="380" x2="150" y2="380" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="138" y="384" text-anchor="end">0</text>
    <line x1="142" y1="307.5" x2="150" y2="307.5" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="138" y="311.5" text-anchor="end">25</text>
    <line x1="142" y1="235" x2="150" y2="235" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="138" y="239" text-anchor="end">50</text>
    <line x1="142" y1="162.5" x2="150" y2="162.5" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="138" y="166.5" text-anchor="end">75</text>
    <line x1="142" y1="90" x2="150" y2="90" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <text x="138" y="94" text-anchor="end">100</text>
  </g>
  <text x="100" y="240" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af" transform="rotate(-90 100 240)" text-anchor="middle">how full %</text>

  <!-- ===== FULL MARK ~92% -> y=113.2 ===== -->
  <line x1="150" y1="113" x2="320" y2="113" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="3"/>
  <circle cx="250" cy="113" r="5" fill="#8fd0ff" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2"/>
  <text x="334" y="108" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#8fd0ff">the FULL mark  ≈ 92%</text>
  <text x="334" y="129" font-size="13" fill="#46a8ec">overflow above this — wasted water</text>
  <!-- little overflow drips above the full mark -->
  <g fill="#8fd0ff" opacity="0.8">
    <circle cx="178" cy="103" r="3"/>
    <circle cx="210" cy="99" r="3"/>
    <circle cx="236" cy="104" r="3"/>

  <!-- ===== DANGER LINE ~25-30% : draw band 25(307.5)..30(293) , key dashed line at ~27.5 (300.5) ===== -->
  <rect x="150" y="293" width="100" height="14.5" fill="#ef6a5a" opacity="0.16"/>

  <text x="334" y="317" font-size="13" fill="#ef6a5a">below this, water tunnels straight through</text>

  <!-- ===== SAFE DRINK-DOWN RANGE: green double arrow between full(113) and danger(300) ===== -->
  <line x1="290" y1="120" x2="290" y2="293" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="3" marker-start="url(#arrGreen)" marker-end="url(#arrGreen)"/>

  <text x="40" y="410" font-size="12.5" fill="#83917e" font-style="italic">Note: these % are a rockwool example — yours will differ.</text>

fig-12-channeling-cracked-core:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 380" role="img" aria-label="Two block cross-sections compared. Left, a healthy block: a dripper feeds blue water that spreads evenly down through the block, keeping green roots wet throughout. Right, a too-dry block past the danger line: a grey baked cracked core where poured water runs down a couple of cracks and straight out the bottom while the core stays bone-dry. Caption: looks watered, isn't - the dripper can't fix it." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">

    <!-- green roots, wet throughout -->

    <text x="230" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">water reaches every root</text>

    <path d="M690 134 L705 196 L688 248 L700 284" fill="none" stroke="#3a3d37" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <path d="M660 160 L640 210 M708 210 L730 250 M580 220 L560 260" fill="none" stroke="#3a3d37" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>

    <!-- water poured in, channels straight down two cracks and OUT the bottom -->
    <line x1="670" y1="130" x2="670" y2="156" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="4"/>
    <path d="M668 156 L615 134 L600 200 L630 245 L612 284 L621 284 L639 246 L611 201 L624 150 Z" fill="#46a8ec" opacity="0.9"/>
    <path d="M672 156 L690 134 L705 196 L688 248 L700 284 L691 284 L679 248 L696 196 L681 150 Z" fill="#46a8ec" opacity="0.9"/>

    <!-- water escaping out the bottom -->
    <line x1="616" y1="286" x2="616" y2="300" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#ahw)"/>
    <line x1="695" y1="286" x2="695" y2="300" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#ahw)"/>
    <text x="670" y="316" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#8fd0ff">runs straight out</text>

    <!-- bone-dry label inside core -->
    <text x="668" y="216" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">bone-dry inside</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ============ RED DASHED DANGER LINE between the two ============ -->
  <line x1="450" y1="58" x2="450" y2="328" stroke="#ef6a5a" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="9 7"/>

    <text x="450" y="187" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">LINE</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ============ CAPTION ============ -->
  <text x="670" y="356" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86">"looks watered, isn't - the dripper can't fix it"</text>
</svg>

fig-14-p0p3-clock:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 420" role="img" aria-label="A clock-like daily loop split into four phases in order: dry a little (P0), fill up in sips (P1), hold steady (P2), wind down overnight (P3), with a sun at top for lights-on and a moon at bottom for lights-off. A blue how-full line on the inner rim dips, climbs, stays flat, then dips big, and a loop arrow returns the last phase to the first." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <text x="450" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">The Daily Loop: Four Beats</text>
  <text x="450" y="56" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">Every day is the same four steps, in order, around the clock</text>

  <!-- center of ring: cx=450 cy=240, outer r=140, inner r=92 -->

  <!-- ARC SEGMENTS (90deg each). Top=12 o'clock = lights-on. -->
  <!-- P0 dry a little: top-right quadrant (12 -> 3 o'clock) green-ish phase -->
  <path d="M 450 100 A 140 140 0 0 1 590 240 L 542 240 A 92 92 0 0 0 450 148 Z" fill="#46c46a" fill-opacity="0.16" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <!-- P1 fill up in sips: bottom-right (3 -> 6 o'clock) water -->
  <path d="M 590 240 A 140 140 0 0 1 450 380 L 450 332 A 92 92 0 0 0 542 240 Z" fill="#46a8ec" fill-opacity="0.16" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <!-- P2 hold steady: bottom-left (6 -> 9 o'clock) water lighter -->
  <path d="M 450 380 A 140 140 0 0 1 310 240 L 358 240 A 92 92 0 0 0 450 332 Z" fill="#8fd0ff" fill-opacity="0.14" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <!-- P3 wind down overnight: top-left (9 -> 12 o'clock) dryback orange -->
  <path d="M 310 240 A 140 140 0 0 1 450 100 L 450 148 A 92 92 0 0 0 358 240 Z" fill="#f5a83f" fill-opacity="0.16" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="2.5"/>

  <!-- SUN at top (lights-on) -->
  <g>
    <line x1="450" y1="78" x2="450" y2="68" stroke="#ffce86" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="430" y1="86" x2="423" y2="79" stroke="#ffce86" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="470" y1="86" x2="477" y2="79" stroke="#ffce86" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="418" y1="100" x2="408" y2="100" stroke="#ffce86" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="482" y1="100" x2="492" y2="100" stroke="#ffce86" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="450" cy="100" r="13" fill="#f5a83f" stroke="#ffce86" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  </g>
  <text x="450" y="86" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86" opacity="0"> </text>
  <text x="450" y="126" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#ffce86">lights-on</text>

  <!-- MOON at bottom (lights-off) -->
  <g transform="translate(450,380)">
    <path d="M 7 -10 A 12 12 0 1 0 7 10 A 9 9 0 0 1 7 -10 Z" fill="#9b7be8" stroke="#b4c2af" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  </g>
  <text x="450" y="360" text-anchor="middle" font-family="sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af">lights-off</text>

  <!-- SPARKLINE on inner rim mirroring phases: dip, climb, flat, big dip (water color) -->
  <!-- drawn as a small how-full trace just inside r=92, clockwise from top -->
  <path d="M 450 165
           C 478 168, 500 178, 510 198
           C 514 206, 516 214, 518 222
           C 522 250, 510 282, 482 305
           C 472 313, 462 318, 450 322
           C 438 318, 428 313, 418 305
           C 404 294, 396 280, 392 266
           C 390 258, 389 250, 388 242

fig-16-veg-gen-same-loop:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 400" role="img" aria-label="Same loop, swap the dials: one daily four-beat routine stays the same; you slot in either a green Leaves Mode card or a pink Flower Mode card to change only the numbers." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="ah" markerWidth="9" markerHeight="9" refX="6.5" refY="4.5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1 1 L8 4.5 L1 8 Z" fill="#b4c2af"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="ahG" markerWidth="9" markerHeight="9" refX="6.5" refY="4.5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1 1 L8 4.5 L1 8 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="ahP" markerWidth="9" markerHeight="9" refX="6.5" refY="4.5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1 1 L8 4.5 L1 8 Z" fill="#f472b6"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="ahLoop" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="5" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1 1 L9 5 L1 9 Z" fill="#8fd0ff"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- TITLE -->
  <text x="450" y="34" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">Same Loop, Swap the Dials</text>

  <!-- ================= CENTER LOOP ================= -->
  <g>
    <!-- circular flow ring -->
    <circle cx="450" cy="205" r="78" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="3 0"/>
    <!-- four direction arrowheads on the ring -->
    <path d="M450 127 a78 78 0 0 1 0 0" fill="none"/>
    <!-- arrowheads placed around the ring (clockwise) -->
    <g fill="#8fd0ff">
      <path d="M524 200 l10 5 l-10 5 z" transform="rotate(90 528 205)"/>
    </g>

    <!-- four beats as small dots/labels around circle -->
    <!-- top: WATER -->
    <circle cx="450" cy="127" r="9" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <text x="450" y="108" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">1. water</text>
    <!-- right: DRINK DOWN -->
    <circle cx="528" cy="205" r="9" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    <text x="546" y="200" text-anchor="start" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86">2. drink-down</text>
    <!-- bottom: CHECK -->
    <circle cx="450" cy="283" r="9" fill="#3fc8d6"/>
    <text x="450" y="305" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">3. check</text>
    <!-- left: REPEAT -->
    <circle cx="372" cy="205" r="9" fill="#9b7be8"/>
    <text x="354" y="200" text-anchor="end" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">4. repeat</text>

    <!-- clockwise hint arrows along ring -->
    <path d="M468 130 A78 78 0 0 1 524 178" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#ahLoop)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <path d="M524 232 A78 78 0 0 1 468 280" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#ahLoop)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <path d="M432 280 A78 78 0 0 1 376 232" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#ahLoop)" opacity="0.85"/>
    <path d="M376 178 A78 78 0 0 1 432 130" fill="none" stroke="#8fd0ff" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#ahLoop)" opacity="0.85"/>

    <!-- center numbers slot/socket (empty) -->
    <rect x="414" y="186" width="72" height="38" rx="9" fill="#0e150d" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="5 4"/>
    <text x="450" y="201" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#b4c2af">numbers</text>
    <text x="450" y="215" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#83917e">slot here</text>

    <text x="450" y="360" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#83917e">the loop</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ================= LEAVES MODE CARD (left) ================= -->
  <g>
    <rect x="32" y="92" width="232" height="220" rx="13" fill="#141c14" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- card header -->
    <circle cx="64" cy="124" r="11" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <text x="84" y="120" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">LEAVES MODE</text>
    <text x="84" y="138" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af">grow big & green</text>

    <line x1="52" y1="152" x2="244" y2="152" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>

    <!-- spec rows -->
    <text x="52" y="182" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">drink-down</text>
    <text x="244" y="182" text-anchor="end" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">5-15 points</text>

    <text x="52" y="222" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">feed strength</text>
    <text x="244" y="222" text-anchor="end" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">~3.0</text>

    <text x="52" y="262" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">sips</text>
    <text x="244" y="262" text-anchor="end" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">many small</text>

    <!-- slot tab -->
    <rect x="120" y="282" width="56" height="18" rx="5" fill="#46c46a" opacity="0.35"/>
    <text x="148" y="295" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#84e6a2">slots in →</text>
  </g>
  <!-- arrow LEAVES -> loop -->
  <path d="M268 205 H384" fill="none" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#ahG)"/>

  <!-- ================= FLOWER MODE CARD (right) ================= -->
  <g>
    <rect x="636" y="92" width="232" height="220" rx="13" fill="#141c14" stroke="#f472b6" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="668" cy="124" r="11" fill="#f472b6"/>
    <text x="688" y="120" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffb0da">FLOWER MODE</text>
    <text x="688" y="138" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af">make the buds</text>

    <line x1="656" y1="152" x2="848" y2="152" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>

    <text x="656" y="182" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">drink-down</text>
    <text x="848" y="182" text-anchor="end" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffb0da">20-30 points</text>

    <text x="656" y="222" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">feed strength</text>
    <text x="848" y="222" text-anchor="end" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffb0da">4.5-6.0</text>

    <text x="656" y="262" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">sips</text>
    <text x="848" y="262" text-anchor="end" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffb0da">fewer bigger</text>

    <rect x="728" y="282" width="56" height="18" rx="5" fill="#f472b6" opacity="0.35"/>
    <text x="756" y="295" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#ffb0da">← slots in</text>
  </g>
  <!-- arrow FLOWER -> loop -->
  <path d="M632 205 H516" fill="none" stroke="#f472b6" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#ahP)"/>

  <!-- ================= CAPTION ================= -->
  <text x="450" y="392" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">the loop never changes — only the numbers you plug in</text>
</svg>
fig-17-gearbox-swap:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 420" role="img" aria-label="A fixed driver feeds your watering into a swappable gearbox; the sponge you choose changes what the roots feel. Four swap-in modules: Rockwool instant and unforgiving, Coco cushioned, Soil self-correcting, Water no safety net. Same input, different output per sponge." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="ah" markerWidth="11" markerHeight="11" refX="8" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1,1 L9,5 L1,9 Z" fill="#eaf1e8"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="ahw" markerWidth="11" markerHeight="11" refX="8" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1,1 L9,5 L1,9 Z" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="aho" markerWidth="11" markerHeight="11" refX="8" refY="5" orient="auto">
      <path d="M1,1 L9,5 L1,9 Z" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <text x="450" y="30" text-anchor="middle" font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">Swap the Gearbox, Keep the Driver</text>

  <!-- ================= TOP ROW: driver -> gearbox -> roots ================= -->

  <!-- DRIVER -->
  <g>
    <rect x="34" y="60" width="172" height="120" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- wheel -->
    <circle cx="92" cy="112" r="26" fill="none" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="3"/>
    <circle cx="92" cy="112" r="5" fill="#83917e"/>
    <line x1="92" y1="86" x2="92" y2="138" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="66" y1="112" x2="118" y2="112" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="74" y1="94" x2="110" y2="130" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="3"/>
    <line x1="110" y1="94" x2="74" y2="130" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- lever -->
    <line x1="150" y1="138" x2="166" y2="84" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="166" cy="84" r="7" fill="#b4c2af"/>
    <text x="120" y="158" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">DRIVER</text>
    <text x="120" y="173" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#83917e">never changes</text>
  </g>

  <!-- INPUT arrow -->
  <line x1="206" y1="120" x2="312" y2="120" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#ahw)"/>
  <text x="259" y="106" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#8fd0ff">your watering</text>
  <text x="259" y="143" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11.5" fill="#46a8ec">how-full, feed strength</text>

  <!-- GEARBOX -->
  <g>
    <rect x="318" y="62" width="170" height="116" rx="14" fill="#d9b88a" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="3"/>
    <!-- meshing gears -->
    <g transform="translate(370,118)" fill="#9a7d54">
      <circle r="22"/><circle r="9" fill="#d9b88a"/>
      <g stroke="#9a7d54" stroke-width="6">
        <line x1="0" y1="-22" x2="0" y2="-30"/><line x1="0" y1="22" x2="0" y2="30"/>
        <line x1="-22" y1="0" x2="-30" y2="0"/><line x1="22" y1="0" x2="30" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="-16" y1="-16" x2="-22" y2="-22"/><line x1="16" y1="16" x2="22" y2="22"/>
        <line x1="16" y1="-16" x2="22" y2="-22"/><line x1="-16" y1="16" x2="-22" y2="22"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <g transform="translate(424,110)" fill="#9a7d54">
      <circle r="16"/><circle r="6" fill="#d9b88a"/>
      <g stroke="#9a7d54" stroke-width="5">
        <line x1="0" y1="-16" x2="0" y2="-23"/><line x1="0" y1="16" x2="0" y2="23"/>
        <line x1="-16" y1="0" x2="-23" y2="0"/><line x1="16" y1="0" x2="23" y2="0"/>
        <line x1="-11" y1="-11" x2="-16" y2="-16"/><line x1="11" y1="11" x2="16" y2="16"/>
      </g>
    </g>
    <text x="403" y="170" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#3a2c14">THE SPONGE</text>
  </g>
  <text x="403" y="52" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" fill="#f0d9b5">= the gearbox</text>

  <!-- OUTPUT arrow -->
  <line x1="488" y1="120" x2="596" y2="120" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#aho)"/>
  <text x="542" y="106" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86">what the</text>
  <text x="542" y="143" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86">roots feel</text>

  <!-- ROOTS -->
  <g>
    <rect x="602" y="60" width="264" height="120" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- plant -->
    <line x1="670" y1="150" x2="670" y2="92" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="4"/>
    <path d="M670,108 q-26,-8 -34,-26 q24,-2 34,18 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <path d="M670,100 q26,-10 34,-28 q-24,-2 -34,20 Z" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <circle cx="670" cy="84" r="9" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <!-- roots -->
    <path d="M670,150 q-10,18 -22,30 M670,150 q0,22 0,34 M670,150 q12,16 22,30" fill="none" stroke="#d9b88a" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <text x="775" y="112" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">THE ROOTS</text>
    <text x="775" y="132" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af">only feel the</text>
    <text x="775" y="148" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af">output, not your</text>
    <text x="775" y="164" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af">watering directly</text>
  </g>

  <!-- swap hint -->
  <line x1="403" y1="178" x2="403" y2="212" stroke="#f0d9b5" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="4 4" marker-end="url(#ah)"/>
  <text x="403" y="206" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12" fill="#f0d9b5">swap in one:</text>

  <!-- ================= FOUR SWAP-IN MODULES ================= -->
  <g font-size="13.5">
    <!-- ROCKWOOL -->
    <rect x="34" y="226" width="200" height="118" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#d9b88a" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <rect x="50" y="244" width="168" height="20" rx="5" fill="#d9b88a" opacity="0.35"/>
    <text x="134" y="259" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#f0d9b5">ROCKWOOL</text>
    <text x="134" y="292" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">instant &</text>
    <text x="134" y="312" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">unforgiving</text>
    <text x="134" y="332" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11.5" fill="#83917e">output = input, no buffer</text>

    <!-- COCO -->
    <rect x="250" y="226" width="200" height="118" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#d9b88a" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <rect x="266" y="244" width="168" height="20" rx="5" fill="#d9b88a" opacity="0.35"/>
    <text x="350" y="259" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#f0d9b5">COCO</text>
    <text x="350" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold" fill="#46c46a">cushioned</text>
    <text x="350" y="324" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11.5" fill="#83917e">softens the swings</text>

    <!-- SOIL -->
    <rect x="466" y="226" width="200" height="118" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#d9b88a" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <rect x="482" y="244" width="168" height="20" rx="5" fill="#d9b88a" opacity="0.35"/>
    <text x="566" y="259" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#f0d9b5">SOIL</text>
    <text x="566" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold" fill="#46c46a">self-correcting</text>
    <text x="566" y="324" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11.5" fill="#83917e">forgives small mistakes</text>

    <!-- WATER -->
    <rect x="682" y="226" width="184" height="118" rx="12" fill="#141c14" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <rect x="698" y="244" width="152" height="20" rx="5" fill="#46a8ec" opacity="0.3"/>
    <text x="774" y="259" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#8fd0ff">WATER</text>
    <text x="774" y="300" text-anchor="middle" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">no safety net</text>
    <text x="774" y="324" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11.5" fill="#83917e">a mistake hits at once</text>
  </g>

<svg viewBox="0 0 900 360" role="img" aria-label="Precise is not the same as right. A digital readout shows 58.3724 percent next to a clock whose hands are set ten minutes fast, labelled looks precise but still wrong. A bullseye target on the right has a wide error ring before calibration and a tight ring after calibrating to your sponge." font-family="sans-serif">
  <title>Precise Is Not the Same As Right</title>
  <desc>A high-decimal number and a fast clock show that precision is not accuracy until you calibrate to your sponge.</desc>

  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="450" y="36" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">Precise Is Not the Same As Right</text>

  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0,0 L10,5 L0,10 z" fill="#83917e"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- ============ LEFT PANEL: precise-looking but wrong ============ -->
  <rect x="34" y="62" width="392" height="244" rx="14" fill="#141c14"/>

  <!-- Digital readout -->
  <rect x="62" y="96" width="240" height="62" rx="10" fill="#0e150d" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <text x="182" y="139" text-anchor="middle" font-size="32" font-weight="bold" fill="#8fd0ff" font-family="monospace">58.3724%</text>
  <text x="182" y="180" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">lots of decimals - looks precise</text>

  <!-- Clock, set 10 minutes fast -->
  <circle cx="345" cy="135" r="50" fill="#0e150d" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="3"/>
  <!-- tick marks at 12, 3, 6, 9 -->
  <line x1="345" y1="91" x2="345" y2="99" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <line x1="389" y1="135" x2="381" y2="135" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <line x1="345" y1="179" x2="345" y2="171" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <line x1="301" y1="135" x2="309" y2="135" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <!-- hands set 10 min fast: minute hand points to 2 (10 past), hour just past 12 -->
  <line x1="345" y1="135" x2="345" y2="103" stroke="#eaf1e8" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <line x1="345" y1="135" x2="377" y2="116" stroke="#eaf1e8" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <circle cx="345" cy="135" r="4" fill="#ffce86"/>
  <!-- second-hand ticking accent -->
  <line x1="345" y1="135" x2="328" y2="167" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="345" y="200" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#83917e">ticks every second</text>

  <!-- Still wrong banner -->
  <rect x="62" y="222" width="328" height="62" rx="10" fill="#0e150d" stroke="#ef6a5a" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <text x="86" y="248" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">still wrong</text>
  <text x="86" y="270" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">the clock is 10 minutes fast - neat but off</text>

  <!-- bridging arrow -->
  <line x1="430" y1="184" x2="468" y2="184" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>
  <text x="449" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11" fill="#83917e">fix it</text>

  <!-- ============ RIGHT PANEL: the target / calibration ============ -->
  <rect x="474" y="62" width="392" height="244" rx="14" fill="#141c14"/>
  <text x="670" y="92" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">aim for the truth</text>

  <!-- Bullseye -->
  <!-- wide error ring (before calibration) -->
  <circle cx="640" cy="190" r="86" fill="none" stroke="#ef6a5a" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="7 6"/>
  <circle cx="640" cy="190" r="62" fill="none" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
  <!-- tight ring (after calibrating to your sponge) -->
  <circle cx="640" cy="190" r="34" fill="none" stroke="#3fc8d6" stroke-width="3.5"/>
  <!-- center bullseye = the truth -->
  <circle cx="640" cy="190" r="9" fill="#3fc8d6"/>
  <circle cx="640" cy="190" r="3.5" fill="#0e150d"/>

  <!-- scattered "before" hits, wide -->
  <circle cx="592" cy="142" r="4" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
  <circle cx="704" cy="158" r="4" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
  <circle cx="588" cy="236" r="4" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
  <circle cx="700" cy="232" r="4" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
  <!-- tight "after" hits, near center -->
  <circle cx="628" cy="178" r="4" fill="#8fd0ff"/>
  <circle cx="652" cy="200" r="4" fill="#8fd0ff"/>
  <circle cx="650" cy="176" r="4" fill="#8fd0ff"/>

  <!-- labels with leader lines -->
  <line x1="640" y1="104" x2="640" y2="120" stroke="#ef6a5a" stroke-width="1.5"/>
  <text x="640" y="116" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">before calibration</text>

  <text x="788" y="186" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#3fc8d6">after</text>
  <text x="788" y="202" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#3fc8d6">calibrating to</text>
  <text x="788" y="218" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#3fc8d6">your sponge</text>
  <line x1="730" y1="200" x2="676" y2="194" stroke="#3fc8d6" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arrow)"/>

  <!-- ============ Caption ============ -->
  <text x="450" y="340" text-anchor="middle" font-size="15" fill="#eaf1e8">a precise-looking number can still be wrong until you <tspan font-weight="bold" fill="#3fc8d6">calibrate</tspan></text>
</svg>
fig-23-one-witness-second-witness:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 380" role="img" aria-label="One probe lights only a soda-can-sized spot in the pot; a valve should open only after a second witness — water dripping out the bottom or pot weight — confirms it is dry." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="ar" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    </marker>
    <radialGradient id="spot" cx="50%" cy="50%" r="50%">
      <stop offset="0%" stop-color="#3fc8d6" stop-opacity="0.85"/>
      <stop offset="55%" stop-color="#3fc8d6" stop-opacity="0.35"/>
      <stop offset="100%" stop-color="#3fc8d6" stop-opacity="0"/>
    </radialGradient>
  </defs>

  <text x="34" y="40" fill="#eaf1e8" font-size="22" font-weight="bold">One Witness Isn't Enough</text>
  <text x="34" y="64" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="14">Never trust one sensor alone — get a second confirmation before you water.</text>

  <!-- LEFT: pot cross-section -->
  <g>
    <rect x="34" y="92" width="300" height="232" rx="12" fill="#141c14"/>
    <text x="184" y="118" text-anchor="middle" fill="#eaf1e8" font-size="15" font-weight="bold">One probe feels only this spot</text>

    <!-- pot shape (dim sponge) -->
    <path d="M88 150 L280 150 L262 300 L106 300 Z" fill="#d9b88a" fill-opacity="0.22" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- soil dim overlay handled by low opacity above -->

    <!-- probe -->
    <rect x="176" y="128" width="16" height="36" rx="3" fill="#3fc8d6"/>
    <rect x="170" y="160" width="6" height="86" rx="3" fill="#3fc8d6"/>
    <rect x="192" y="160" width="6" height="86" rx="3" fill="#3fc8d6"/>

    <!-- spotlight glow around prongs (soda-can sized) -->
    <ellipse cx="184" cy="218" rx="62" ry="62" fill="url(#spot)"/>
    <ellipse cx="184" cy="218" rx="46" ry="46" fill="none" stroke="#3fc8d6" stroke-width="2" stroke-dasharray="5 5" stroke-opacity="0.9"/>
    <text x="184" y="222" text-anchor="middle" fill="#0e150d" font-size="12" font-weight="bold">lit</text>

    <!-- rest of pot is dim label -->
    <text x="120" y="288" fill="#83917e" font-size="12">the rest stays dark</text>
    <text x="184" y="345" text-anchor="middle" fill="#3fc8d6" font-size="12.5">soda-can-sized spot</text>
  </g>

  <!-- RIGHT: two witnesses -->
  <g>
    <text x="378" y="118" fill="#eaf1e8" font-size="15" font-weight="bold">Get a second witness</text>

    <!-- Witness 1: water dripping out the bottom -->
    <rect x="378" y="132" width="210" height="86" rx="12" fill="#141c14"/>
    <!-- pot bottom + drip -->
    <path d="M404 150 L452 150 L444 178 L412 178 Z" fill="#d9b88a" fill-opacity="0.5" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <path d="M428 180 q-4 8 0 12 q4 -4 0 -12 z" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <circle cx="428" cy="204" r="3.5" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <text x="470" y="170" fill="#eaf1e8" font-size="13.5" font-weight="bold">Water dripping</text>
    <text x="470" y="190" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="13">out the bottom</text>

    <!-- Witness 2: pot weight (lift it) -->
    <rect x="378" y="228" width="210" height="86" rx="12" fill="#141c14"/>
    <!-- hand/scale lift icon -->
    <path d="M404 286 L444 286 L438 258 L410 258 Z" fill="#d9b88a" fill-opacity="0.5" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="1.5"/>
    <path d="M398 252 q26 -22 52 0" fill="none" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <path d="M396 250 l4 8 l6 -6 z" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    <path d="M452 250 l-4 8 l-6 -6 z" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    <text x="470" y="266" fill="#eaf1e8" font-size="13.5" font-weight="bold">Pot weight</text>
    <text x="470" y="286" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="13">(lift it)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- FAR RIGHT: valve gated by agreement -->
  <g>
    <!-- arrow from witnesses to valve -->
    <line x1="600" y1="223" x2="668" y2="223" stroke="#84e6a2" stroke-width="3" marker-end="url(#ar)"/>
    <text x="634" y="210" text-anchor="middle" fill="#84e6a2" font-size="11.5">only then</text>

    <rect x="676" y="150" width="190" height="146" rx="14" fill="#141c14" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- check -->
    <circle cx="771" cy="190" r="22" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <path d="M761 190 l7 8 l13 -16" fill="none" stroke="#0e150d" stroke-width="4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <text x="771" y="238" text-anchor="middle" fill="#46c46a" font-size="15" font-weight="bold">VALVE OPENS</text>
    <text x="771" y="262" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="12.5">two witnesses agree</text>
    <text x="771" y="280" text-anchor="middle" fill="#b4c2af" font-size="12.5">→ safe to water</text>
  </g>

  <!-- caption / danger note -->
  <g>
    <rect x="34" y="352" width="832" height="2" fill="#26331e"/>
  </g>
  <text x="450" y="374" text-anchor="middle" fill="#ef6a5a" font-size="13.5" font-weight="bold">Never wire one probe straight to a valve.</text>
</svg>
fig-25-water-bank-account:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 380" role="img" aria-label="The Water Piggy Bank: water level inside a pot equals what drips in minus what the plant breathes out and what drains away. A sensor gives one opinion, checked against the level." font-family="sans-serif" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <marker id="ahGreen" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="ahRed" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#ef6a5a"/>
    </marker>
    <marker id="ahCyan" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#3fc8d6"/>
    </marker>
    <clipPath id="pigClip">
      <path d="M250 200 q0 -78 95 -78 q22 -34 50 -28 q10 14 6 30 q40 14 40 76 q0 30 -22 50 l4 30 q1 12 -12 12 l-22 0 q-10 0 -12 -12 l-2 -14 q-26 6 -54 0 l-2 14 q-2 12 -12 12 l-22 0 q-13 0 -12 -12 l4 -28 q-37 -22 -37 -72 z"/>
    </clipPath>
  </defs>

  <!-- auto-brain framing panel (violet) -->
  <rect x="14" y="14" width="872" height="352" rx="14" fill="#141c14" stroke="#9b7be8" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-dasharray="2 7" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="34" y="44" font-size="14" font-weight="bold" fill="#9b7be8">AUTO-BRAIN</text>
  <text x="34" y="62" font-size="12.5" fill="#83917e">it keeps the running total</text>

  <!-- title -->
  <text x="450" y="44" text-anchor="middle" font-size="22" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">The Water Piggy Bank</text>
  <text x="450" y="67" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14.5" fill="#b4c2af">level in the pot  =  what dripped IN  −  what left</text>

  <!-- IN arrow (green) -->
  <line x1="343" y1="92" x2="343" y2="118" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#ahGreen)"/>
  <g fill="#46c46a">
    <circle cx="324" cy="100" r="2.4"/>
    <circle cx="333" cy="92" r="2.4"/>
    <circle cx="353" cy="94" r="2.4"/>
    <circle cx="362" cy="101" r="2.4"/>
  </g>
  <text x="378" y="100" font-size="14.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">drips add water</text>
  <text x="378" y="118" font-size="12.5" fill="#83917e">(money IN)</text>

  <!-- PIGGY BANK body -->
  <path d="M250 200 q0 -78 95 -78 q22 -34 50 -28 q10 14 6 30 q40 14 40 76 q0 30 -22 50 l4 30 q1 12 -12 12 l-22 0 q-10 0 -12 -12 l-2 -14 q-26 6 -54 0 l-2 14 q-2 12 -12 12 l-22 0 q-13 0 -12 -12 l4 -28 q-37 -22 -37 -72 z"
        fill="#141c14" stroke="#9b7be8" stroke-width="3"/>
  <!-- water fill inside, clipped to pig shape -->
  <g clip-path="url(#pigClip)">
    <rect x="240" y="196" width="240" height="120" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <path d="M240 196 q15 -8 30 0 t30 0 t30 0 t30 0 t30 0 t30 0 t30 0 v120 h-240 z" fill="#8fd0ff" opacity="0.55"/>
  </g>
  <!-- coin slot on top -->
  <rect x="332" y="130" width="26" height="5" rx="2.5" fill="#9b7be8"/>
  <!-- eye + ear + snout -->
  <circle cx="312" cy="146" r="4" fill="#0e150d"/>
  <ellipse cx="278" cy="170" rx="13" ry="10" fill="#0e150d" opacity="0.55"/>
  <circle cx="274" cy="168" r="2.6" fill="#46a8ec"/>
  <circle cx="282" cy="168" r="2.6" fill="#46a8ec"/>
  <!-- little legs hint already in path -->
  <text x="365" y="232" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">the pot</text>

  <!-- OUT arrow (red) from pig to the right -->
  <line x1="436" y1="172" x2="486" y2="172" stroke="#ef6a5a" stroke-width="4" marker-end="url(#ahRed)"/>
  <!-- sun / heat icon driving it -->
  <g transform="translate(512,120)">
    <circle cx="0" cy="0" r="13" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    <g stroke="#ffce86" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round">
      <line x1="0" y1="-19" x2="0" y2="-25"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="19" x2="0" y2="25"/>
      <line x1="-19" y1="0" x2="-25" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="19" y1="0" x2="25" y2="0"/>
      <line x1="-13" y1="-13" x2="-18" y2="-18"/>
      <line x1="13" y1="-13" x2="18" y2="-18"/>
      <line x1="-13" y1="13" x2="-18" y2="18"/>
      <line x1="13" y1="13" x2="18" y2="18"/>
    </g>
    <text x="0" y="42" text-anchor="middle" font-size="11.5" fill="#ffce86">heat drives it</text>
  </g>
  <text x="498" y="168" font-size="14.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#ef6a5a">water leaves (money OUT)</text>
  <text x="498" y="187" font-size="12.5" fill="#b4c2af">plant breathes it out — like sweating</text>
  <text x="498" y="204" font-size="12.5" fill="#b4c2af">+ some drains out the bottom</text>
  <!-- drain drips under pig -->
  <g fill="#f5a83f">
    <circle cx="345" cy="298" r="2.6"/>
    <circle cx="358" cy="306" r="2.2"/>
    <circle cx="333" cy="308" r="2.2"/>
  </g>
  <text x="455" y="300" font-size="12" fill="#83917e">↓ a little drains away</text>

  <!-- SIDE LEVEL GAUGE (the truth) -->
  <g transform="translate(150,150)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="44" height="150" rx="8" fill="#141c14" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2.5"/>
    <rect x="6" y="62" width="32" height="82" rx="5" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <rect x="6" y="58" width="32" height="8" rx="4" fill="#8fd0ff"/>
    <!-- tick marks -->
    <g stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="1.5">
      <line x1="44" y1="24" x2="52" y2="24"/>
      <line x1="44" y1="62" x2="56" y2="62"/>
      <line x1="44" y1="103" x2="52" y2="103"/>
      <line x1="44" y1="144" x2="56" y2="144"/>
    </g>
    <text x="62" y="66" font-size="11.5" fill="#8fd0ff">now</text>
    <text x="22" y="-12" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">real water</text>
    <text x="22" y="172" text-anchor="middle" font-size="12.5" fill="#b4c2af">in the pot</text>
    <!-- link the gauge to the pig -->
    <line x1="44" y1="100" x2="100" y2="60" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-dasharray="3 4"/>
  </g>

  <!-- SENSOR icon (one opinion) -->
  <g transform="translate(660,250)">
    <rect x="0" y="0" width="206" height="98" rx="11" fill="#141c14" stroke="#3fc8d6" stroke-width="2"/>
    <!-- probe icon -->
    <g transform="translate(26,30)">
      <rect x="-4" y="0" width="8" height="40" rx="3" fill="#3fc8d6"/>
      <path d="M0 40 l-7 14 l14 0 z" fill="#3fc8d6"/>
      <line x1="0" y1="0" x2="0" y2="-10" stroke="#3fc8d6" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <circle cx="0" cy="-13" r="3" fill="#3fc8d6"/>
    </g>
    <text x="52" y="30" font-size="13.5" font-weight="bold" fill="#3fc8d6">a sensor =</text>
    <text x="52" y="49" font-size="13" fill="#eaf1e8">one opinion</text>
    <text x="52" y="68" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af">checked against the level —</text>
    <text x="52" y="84" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af">it's not the boss</text>
  </g>
  <!-- sensor checks the gauge (cyan dashed) -->
  <path d="M660 290 C 520 320, 320 330, 196 280" fill="none" stroke="#3fc8d6" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-dasharray="4 5" marker-end="url(#ahCyan)"/>
</svg>

fig-27-three-branch-tree:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 360" role="img" aria-label="A decision node 'should I water?' splits into three branches: water a measured bit, wait with a tiny safe sip, or ask a human. An arching fence labelled 'never flood, never starve' guards all three." font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="ah" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#83917e"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- arching fence over everything -->
  <path d="M70 96 Q450 28 830 96" fill="none" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
  <text x="450" y="50" text-anchor="middle" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#8fd0ff">the promise: never flood, never starve</text>
  <!-- little fence posts -->
  <line x1="160" y1="86" x2="160" y2="100" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="300" y1="78" x2="300" y2="92" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="450" y1="74" x2="450" y2="88" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="600" y1="78" x2="600" y2="92" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="740" y1="86" x2="740" y2="100" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="2"/>

  <!-- decision node -->
  <rect x="335" y="108" width="230" height="54" rx="13" fill="#141c14" stroke="#9b7be8" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <text x="450" y="132" text-anchor="middle" font-size="18" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">should I water?</text>
  <text x="450" y="151" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" fill="#b4c2af">the auto-brain checks the clues</text>

  <!-- connectors -->
  <path d="M400 162 Q210 178 180 206" fill="none" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ah)"/>
  <path d="M450 162 L450 204" fill="none" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ah)"/>
  <path d="M500 162 Q690 178 720 206" fill="none" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2.5" marker-end="url(#ah)"/>

  <!-- branch 1: WATER -->
  <rect x="40" y="208" width="240" height="116" rx="13" fill="#141c14" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <circle cx="74" cy="240" r="14" fill="#46c46a"/>
  <path d="M74 232 q9 9 0 17 q-9 -8 0 -17 z" fill="#0e150d"/>
  <text x="98" y="245" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#84e6a2">WATER a measured bit</text>
  <text x="62" y="278" font-size="14" fill="#eaf1e8">clues agree + there's room</text>
  <text x="62" y="300" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">gives one small, safe pour</text>

  <!-- branch 2: WAIT -->
  <rect x="330" y="208" width="240" height="116" rx="13" fill="#141c14" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <circle cx="364" cy="240" r="14" fill="#f5a83f"/>
  <rect x="361" y="233" width="2.5" height="9" rx="1" fill="#0e150d"/>
  <rect x="362.5" y="239" width="6" height="2.5" rx="1" fill="#0e150d"/>
  <text x="388" y="245" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffce86">WAIT / tiny safe sip</text>
  <text x="352" y="278" font-size="14" fill="#eaf1e8">not sure yet? hold off</text>
  <text x="352" y="300" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">at most a tiny taste, then re-check</text>

  <!-- branch 3: ASK -->
  <rect x="620" y="208" width="240" height="116" rx="13" fill="#141c14" stroke="#9b7be8" stroke-width="2.5"/>
  <circle cx="654" cy="240" r="14" fill="#9b7be8"/>
  <text x="654" y="246" text-anchor="middle" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#0e150d">?</text>
  <text x="678" y="245" font-size="17" font-weight="bold" fill="#c9b6f5">ASK a human</text>
  <text x="642" y="278" font-size="14" fill="#eaf1e8">clues disagree → pause</text>
  <text x="642" y="300" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">pings you to decide</text>

  <!-- footer note -->
  <text x="450" y="348" text-anchor="middle" font-size="14" fill="#83917e">"wait" and "ask" are the system working, not failing</text>
</svg>

fig-31-whole-grow-arc:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 400" role="img" aria-label="A grow timeline showing the same steering arc across the whole grow: an amber drink-down band rises then eases, and a pink feed-strength band climbs in parallel from veg through flower to ripen and flush." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif">

    <marker id="ah" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">

  <g stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-dasharray="3 4">

    <text x="405" y="318" font-size="13" font-weight="bold" fill="#ffb0da">flower wk1-3</text>
