fig-31b-real-plant-strip:
<svg viewBox="0 0 900 380" role="img" aria-label="A real plant's journey across four stages: wet seedling, leafy grow-the-body, flowering make-the-buds, and ripening ready-to-harvest. Under each stage a small dial shows drink-down and feed going from shallow and weak, to deeper and stronger, then easing off." xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" font-family="sans-serif">
  <defs>
    <marker id="ah" viewBox="0 0 10 10" refX="8" refY="5" markerWidth="7" markerHeight="7" orient="auto-start-reverse">
      <path d="M0 0 L10 5 L0 10 z" fill="#83917e"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>

  <!-- Title -->
  <text x="32" y="34" font-size="20" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">A Real Plant’s Journey</text>
  <text x="32" y="56" font-size="14" fill="#b4c2af">the same plant, start to finish — and the dials behind it</text>

  <!-- big left-to-right arrow under the title spanning the strip -->
  <line x1="40" y1="74" x2="860" y2="74" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="2"/>
  <line x1="40" y1="74" x2="855" y2="74" stroke="#83917e" stroke-width="2" marker-end="url(#ah)" opacity="0.7"/>

  <!-- ===================== PANEL 1: WET SEEDLING ===================== -->
  <g>
    <rect x="32" y="86" width="190" height="200" rx="12" fill="#141c14"/>
    <!-- soil mound -->
    <path d="M62 250 Q127 232 192 250 L192 262 Q127 256 62 262 Z" fill="#d9b88a"/>
    <!-- water droplets on soil = wet -->
    <circle cx="92" cy="246" r="4" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <circle cx="127" cy="242" r="4" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <circle cx="162" cy="246" r="4" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <!-- tiny seedling stem -->
    <path d="M127 244 L127 196" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="4" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- two seed leaves -->
    <path d="M127 200 Q104 188 92 200 Q108 208 127 204 Z" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <path d="M127 200 Q150 188 162 200 Q146 208 127 204 Z" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <text x="127" y="116" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8" text-anchor="middle">Seedling</text>
    <text x="127" y="136" font-size="13" fill="#8fd0ff" text-anchor="middle">stays wet, sips a little</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===================== PANEL 2: LEAFY VEG ===================== -->
  <g>
    <rect x="237" y="86" width="190" height="200" rx="12" fill="#141c14"/>
    <path d="M267 250 Q332 232 397 250 L397 262 Q332 256 267 262 Z" fill="#d9b88a"/>
    <!-- tall stretching stem -->
    <path d="M332 250 L332 150" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- big fan leaves both sides -->
    <path d="M332 168 Q294 150 280 172 Q304 184 332 176 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <path d="M332 168 Q370 150 384 172 Q360 184 332 176 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <path d="M332 200 Q290 184 276 206 Q302 218 332 208 Z" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <path d="M332 200 Q374 184 388 206 Q362 218 332 208 Z" fill="#84e6a2"/>
    <path d="M332 230 Q296 218 284 236 Q306 246 332 238 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <path d="M332 230 Q368 218 380 236 Q358 246 332 238 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <text x="332" y="116" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8" text-anchor="middle">Leafy plant</text>
    <text x="332" y="136" font-size="13" fill="#84e6a2" text-anchor="middle">grow the body</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===================== PANEL 3: FLOWERING ===================== -->
  <g>
    <rect x="442" y="86" width="190" height="200" rx="12" fill="#141c14"/>
    <path d="M472 250 Q537 232 602 250 L602 262 Q537 256 472 262 Z" fill="#d9b88a"/>
    <path d="M537 250 L537 150" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- leaves -->
    <path d="M537 210 Q500 196 488 216 Q512 226 537 218 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <path d="M537 210 Q574 196 586 216 Q562 226 537 218 Z" fill="#46c46a"/>
    <!-- fat buds (pink) -->
    <ellipse cx="537" cy="150" rx="15" ry="22" fill="#f472b6"/>
    <ellipse cx="510" cy="178" rx="11" ry="17" fill="#ffb0da"/>
    <ellipse cx="564" cy="178" rx="11" ry="17" fill="#ffb0da"/>
    <ellipse cx="520" cy="206" rx="10" ry="15" fill="#f472b6"/>
    <ellipse cx="554" cy="206" rx="10" ry="15" fill="#f472b6"/>
    <text x="537" y="116" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8" text-anchor="middle">Flowering</text>
    <text x="537" y="136" font-size="13" fill="#ffb0da" text-anchor="middle">make the buds</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===================== PANEL 4: RIPENING ===================== -->
  <g>
    <rect x="647" y="86" width="190" height="200" rx="12" fill="#141c14"/>
    <path d="M677 250 Q742 232 807 250 L807 262 Q742 256 677 262 Z" fill="#d9b88a"/>
    <path d="M742 250 L742 150" stroke="#46c46a" stroke-width="5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- ambering buds: pink + orange amber tips -->
    <ellipse cx="742" cy="150" rx="15" ry="22" fill="#f472b6"/>
    <ellipse cx="742" cy="142" rx="9" ry="11" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    <ellipse cx="715" cy="178" rx="11" ry="17" fill="#ffb0da"/>
    <ellipse cx="715" cy="172" rx="6" ry="8" fill="#ffce86"/>
    <ellipse cx="769" cy="178" rx="11" ry="17" fill="#ffb0da"/>
    <ellipse cx="769" cy="172" rx="6" ry="8" fill="#ffce86"/>
    <ellipse cx="725" cy="206" rx="10" ry="15" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    <ellipse cx="759" cy="206" rx="10" ry="15" fill="#f5a83f"/>
    <text x="742" y="116" font-size="16" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8" text-anchor="middle">Ripening</text>
    <text x="742" y="136" font-size="13" fill="#ffce86" text-anchor="middle">ready to harvest</text>
  </g>

  <!-- ===================== DIALS ROW ===================== -->
  <text x="32" y="312" font-size="15" font-weight="bold" fill="#eaf1e8">the dials, on a real plant</text>

  <!-- Dial 1: shallow / weak -->
  <g>
    <path d="M97 366 A30 30 0 0 1 157 366" fill="none" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="7"/>
    <!-- drink-down depth fill (shallow) -->
    <path d="M97 366 A30 30 0 0 1 107 343" fill="none" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <!-- needle pointing low -->
    <line x1="127" y1="366" x2="106" y2="350" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <circle cx="127" cy="366" r="4" fill="#46a8ec"/>
    <text x="127" y="378" font-size="12" fill="#b4c2af" text-anchor="middle">shallow · weak</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Dial 2: deeper -->
  <g>
    <path d="M302 366 A30 30 0 0 1 362 366" fill="none" stroke="#26331e" stroke-width="7"/>
    <path d="M302 366 A30 30 0 0 1 332 336" fill="none" stroke="#f5a83f" stroke-width="7" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    <line x1="332" y1="366" x2="332" y2="338" stroke="#46a8ec" stroke-width="3" stroke-linecap="round"/>
